title: Adopt outcome-gated CI for opensubagents/outcomes
question: Does every pull request to opensubagents/outcomes declare a machine-checkable outcome and ship enough evidence to score above the 3.5 floor under HeuristicVerifier?
success_criteria: workflow runs HeuristicVerifier on every pull_request event
merge is blocked when verdict overall is below 3.5
branch protection requires the outcome-gate check on main

capabilities: gate every pull request via deterministic heuristic verifier
block merges below the 3.5 overall floor
protect main with required status checks and enforce admins
